adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu biridaka min sakhatik, wa-bimuAAafatika min AAuqoobatik, wa-aAAoothu bika mink, la ohsee thana-an AAalayk, anta kama athnayta AAala nafsik.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for sitting between two prostrations
adhkar.arabic: ((رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي)).
adhkar.translation: (My Lord forgive me, My Lord forgive me.)
adhkar.transliteration: rabi aghfir liy rabi aghfir liy.
adhkar.instruction: (Rabbigh-fir lee, rabbigh-fir lee.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for sitting between two prostrations
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَاهْدِنِي، وَاجْبُرْنِي، وَعَافِنِي، وَارْزُقْنِي، وَارْفَعْنِي)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, forgive me, have mercy upon me, guide me, enrich me, give me health, grant me sustenance and raise my rank.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir liy waarhamniy waahdiniy waajburniy wa'aafiniy waarzuqniy waarfa'niy.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummagh-fir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, wajburnee, waAAafinee, warzuqnee warfaAAnee.)

adhkar.category_name: Supplications for prostrating due to recitation of the Qur'an
adhkar.arabic: ((سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ، وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ بِحَوْلِهِ وَقُوَّتِهِ، ﴿فَتَبارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ)).
adhkar.translation: (My face fell prostrate before He who created it and brought forth its faculties of hearing and seeing by His might and power.<< So Blessed is Allah, the best of creators.)
adhkar.transliteration: sajada wajhiya liladhiy khalaqahu washaqa sam'ahu wabasarahu bihawlihi waquwatihi fatabaraka allahu aahsanu alkhaaliqiyna.
adhkar.instruction: (Sajada wajhee lillathee khalaqahu washaqqa samAAahu wabasarahu bihawlihi waquwwatih  { tabaraka Allahu ahsanu alkhaliqeen}.)

adhkar.category_name: Supplications for prostrating due to recitation of the Qur'an
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْتُبْ لِي بِهَا عِنْدَكَ أَجْراً، وَضَعْ عَنِّي بِهَا وِزْراً، وَاجْعَلْهَا لِي عِنْدَكَ ذُخْراً، وَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنِّي كَمَا تَقَبَّلْتَهَا مِنْ عَبْدِكَ دَاوُدَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, record for me a reward for this (prostration), and remove from me a sin.  Save it for me and accept it from me just as You had accepted it from Your servant Dawood.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aktub liy bihaa 'indaka aajraan wada' 'aniy bihaa wizraan waaj'alhaa liy 'indaka dhukhraan wataqabalhaa miniy kamaa taqabaltahaa min 'abdika daawuda.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummak-tub lee biha  AAindaka ajra, wadaAA  AAannee biha wizra, wajAAalha lee AAindaka thukhra, wataqabbalha minnee kama taqabbaltaha min AAabdika Dawood.)

adhkar.arabic: ((التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ، وَالصَّلَواتُ، وَالطَّيِّباتُ، السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ، السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ. أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَرَسولُهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (At-tahiyyat is for Allah. All acts of worship and good deeds are for Him.  Peace and the mercy and blessings of Allah be upon you O Prophet.  Peace be upon us and all of Allah’s righteous servants. I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.)(At-tahiyyat: all words which indicate the glorification of Allah.  His eternal existence, His perfection and His sovereignty.)
adhkar.transliteration: altahiyaatu lilahi waalsalawatu waaltayibatu alsalaamu 'alayka aayuhaa alnabiyu warahmahu allahi wabarakaatuhu alsalaamu 'alaynaa wa'alaa 'ibaadi allahi alsaalihiyna. aashhadu aan laa iilaha iilaa allahu waaashhadu aana muhamadaan 'abduhu waraswluhu.
adhkar.instruction: (Attahiyyatu lillahi wassalawatu wattayyibat, assalamu AAalayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu warahmatul-lahi wabarakatuh, assalamu AAalayna waAAala AAibadil-lahis-saliheen. Ash-hadu an la ilaha illal-lah, wa-ashhadu anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh.)

adhkar.category_name: How to recite blessings on the Prophet after the Tashahhud
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا صَلَّيتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ، اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and the followers of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon Ibraheem and upon the followers of Ibraheem.  Verily, You are full of praise and majesty. O Allah, send blessings upon Mohammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent blessings upon Ibraheem and upon the family of Ibraheem.  Verily, You are full of praise and majesty.)(send prayers: praise and exalt him in the highest and superior of gatherings: that of the closest angels to Allah)((al) has been translated in it’s broadest sense: some scholars are of the view that the meaning here is more specific and that it means: his  followers from among his family.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma sali 'alaa muhamadin wa'alaa aali muhamadin kamaa salayta 'alaa iibraahiyma wa'alaa aali iibraahiyma iinaka hamiydun majiydun allahuma baarik 'alaa muhamadin wa'alaa aali muhamadin kamaa baarakta 'alaa iibraahiyma wa'alaa aali iibraahiyma iinaka hamiydun majiydun.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma salli AAala Muhammad, wa-AAala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta AAala Ibraheema wa-AAala ali Ibraheem, innaka Hameedun Majeed, allahumma barik AAala  Muhammad, wa-AAala ali Muhammad, kama barakta AAala Ibraheema wa-AAala ali Ibraheem, innaka Hameedun Majeed.)

adhkar.category_name: How to recite blessings on the Prophet after the Tashahhud
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ. وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى أَزْواجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ. إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the wives and descendants of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon the family of Ibraheem, and send blessings upon Muhammad and upon the wives and descendants of Muhammad, just as You sent blessings upon the family of Ibraheem. Verily, You are full of praise and majesty.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma sali 'alaa muhamadin wa'alaa aazwaajihi wadhuriyatihi kamaa salayta 'alaa aali iibraahiyma. wabaarik 'alaa muhamadin wa'alaa aazwajihi wadhuriyatihi kamaa baarakta 'alaa aali iibraahiyma. iinaka hamiydun majiydun.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma salli AAala Muhammad wa-AAala azwajihi wathurriyyatihi kama sallayta AAala ali Ibraheem, wabarik AAala Muhammad, wa-AAala azwajihi wathurriyyatih, kama barakta AAala ali Ibraheem. innaka Hameedun Majeed.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُــمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the torment of the Fire, from the trials and tribulations of life and death and from the evil affliction of Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal.)(Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal: among the great signs of the last hour and the greatest trials to befall mankind, which every Prophet has warned about.  Most of mankind will follow him. He will appear from Asbahan, Iran at the time when the Muslims will conquer Constantinople.  He will be given special powers and will make the truth seem false and vice versa.  He will claim to be righteous and then he will claim prophethood and finally, divinity.  From his features is that he will be blind in his right eye which is a definite proof that contradicts his claim to be Allah as it is a sign of imperfection.  The word Kafir will be written between his eyes which every believer, literate or illiterate will recognise.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aa'uwdhu bika min 'adhaabi alqabri wamin 'adhaabi jahanama wamin fitnahi almahyaa waalmamaati wamin shari fitnahi almasiyhi aldajaali.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, wamin AAathabi jahannam, wamin fitnatil-mahya walmamat, wamin shari fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ، وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and I take refuge in You from the temptation and trial of Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal, and I take refuge in You from the trials and tribulations of life and death.  O Allah, I take refuge in You from sin and debt.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aa'wdhu bika min 'adhaabi alqabri waaa'wdhu bika min fitnahi almasiyhi aldajaali waaa'wdhu bika min fitnahi almahyaa waalmamaati. allahuma iiniy aa'wdhu bika mina almaathami waalmaghrami.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatil-mahya walmamat. Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-ma/thami walmaghram.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْماً كَثِيراً، وَلاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَارْحَمْنِي، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الغَفورُ الرَّحيمُ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I have indeed oppressed my soul excessively and none can forgive sin except You, so forgive me a forgiveness from Yourself and have mercy upon me.  Surely, You are The Most-Forgiving, The Most-Merciful.)(From Yourself: i.e. from Your innermost grace without deserving it and a forgiveness which is befitting to your tremendous generosity.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy zalamtu nafsiy zulmaan kathiyraan walaa yaghfiru aldhunwba iilaa aanta faaghfir liy maghfirahan min 'indika waarhamniy iinaka aanta alghafwru alrahymu.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee thalamtu nafsee thulman katheeran wala yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant, faghfir lee maghfiratan min AAindik warhamnee, innaka antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ، وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ، وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَفْتُ، وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي. أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ، وَأَنْتَ الْمُؤَخِّرُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, forgive me for those sins which have come to pass as well as those which shall come to pass, and those I have committed in secret as well as those I have made public, and where I have exceeded all bounds as well as those things about which You are more knowledgeable. You are Al-Muqaddim and Al-Mu-akhkhir.  None has the right to be worshipped except You.)(Meaning of Al-Muqaddim and Al-Mu-akhkhir: Allah puts forward and favours whom He wills from amongst His creation just as He defers and holds back whom He wills in accordance to His wisdom.  E.g.  Favouring man over the rest of creation, favouring the Prophets over the rest of mankind, favouring Muhammad  over all the Prophets and Messengers…etc.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir liy maa qadamtu wamaa aakhartu wamaa aasrartu wamaa aa'lantu wamaa aasraftu wamaa aanta aa'lamu bihi miniy. aanta almuqadimu waaanta almuakhiru laa iilaha iilaa aanta.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummagh-fir lee ma qaddamtu,  wama akhkhart, wama asrartu wama aAAlant, wama asraftt, wama anta aAAlamu bihi minnee, antal-muqaddimu wa-antal-mu-akhkhiru la ilaha illa ant.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ، وَشُكْرِكَ، وَحُسْنِ عِبادَتِكَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You in the best of manners.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aa'iniy 'alaa dhikrika washukrika wahusni 'ibadatika.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma aAAinnee AAala thikrik, washukrik, wahusni AAibadatik.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ، وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from miserliness and cowardice, I take refuge in You lest I be returned to the worst of lives “i.e. old age, being weak, incapable and in a state of fear”, and I take refuge in You from the trials and tribulations of this life and the punishment of the grave.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aa'uwdhu bika mina albukhli waaa'wdhu bika mina aljubni waaa'uwdhu bika min aan aurada iilaa aardhali al'umuri waaa'uwdhu bika min fitnahi aldunyaa wa'adhaabi alqabri.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-bukhl, wa-aAAoothu bika minal-jubn, wa-aAAoothu bika min an oradda ila arthalil- AAumur, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatid-dunya waAAathabil-qabr.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You to grant me Paradise and I take refuge in You from the Fire.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa a'udhu bika min sharriha
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee as-alukal-jannah, wa-aAAoothu bika minan-nar.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الغَيْبَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الْخَلقِ أَحْيِنِي مَا عَلِمْتَ الْحَيَاةَ خَيْراً لِي، وَتَوَفَّنِي إِذَا عَلِمْتَ الْوَفَاةَ خَيْراً لِي، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَشْيَتَكَ فِي الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ كَلِمَةَ الْحَقِّ فِي الرِّضَا وَالْغَضَبِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الْقَصْدَ فِي الْغِنَى وَالْفَقْرِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ نَعِيماً لاَ يَنْفَدُ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ قُرَّةَ عَيْنٍ لاَ تَنْقَطِعُ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الرِّضَا بَعْدَ الْقَضَاءِ، وَأَسْــــأَلُكَ بَرْدَ الْعَيْشِ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ لَذَّةَ النَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِكَ، وَالشَّوْقَ إِلَى لِقائِكَ فِي غَيرِ ضَرَّاءَ مُضِرَّةٍ، وَلاَ فِتْنَةٍ مُضِلَّةٍ، اللَّهُمَّ زَيِّنَا بِزِينَةِ الإِيمَانِ، وَاجْعَلْنَا هُدَاةً مُهْتَدِينَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, by Your knowledge of the unseen and Your power over creation, keep me alive so long as You know such life to be good for me and take me if You know death to be better for me.  O Allah, make me fearful of You whether in secret or in public and I ask You to make me true in speech, in times of pleasure and anger.I ask you to make me moderate in times of wealth and poverty and I ask You for everlasting bliss and joy which will never cease.I ask You to make me pleased with what You have decreed and for an easy life after death.I ask You for the sweetness of looking upon Your Face and a longing to encounter You in a manner which does not entail a calamity which will bring about harm nor a trial which will cause deviation. O Allah, beautify us with the adornment of faith and make us of those who guide and are rightly guided.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma bi'ilmika alghayba waqudratika 'alaa alkhalqi aahyiniy maa 'alimta alhayaaha khayraan liy watawafaniy iidhaa 'alimta alwafaaha khayraan liy allahuma iiniy aasaaluka khashyataka fiy alghaybi waalshahaadahi waaasaaluka kalimaha alhaqi fiy alridaa waalghadabi waaasaaluka
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma biAAilmikal-ghayb, waqudratika AAalal-khalq, ahyinee ma AAalimtal-hayata khayran lee watawaffanee itha AAalimtal-wafata khayran lee, allahumma innee as-aluka khashyataka fil-ghaybi washshahadah, wa-as-aluka kalimatal-haqqi fir-rida walghadab, wa-as-alukal-qasda fil-ghina walfaqr, wa-as-aluka naAAeeman la yanfad, wa-as-aluka qurrata AAaynin la tanqatiAA, wa-as-alukar-rida baAAdal-qada/, wa-as-aluka bardal-AAayshi baAAdal-mawt, wa-as-aluka laththatan-nathari ila wajhik, washshawqa ila liqa-ik fee ghayri darraa mudirrah, wala fitnatin mudillah, allahumma zayyinna bizeenatil-eeman wajAAalna hudatan muhtadeen.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا أَللَّهُ بِأَنَّكَ الْوَاحِدُ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يولَدْ، وَلَمْ يَكنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ، أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذُنُوبِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِّيمُ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You O Allah, as You are The One, The Only, AS-Samad, The One who begets not, nor was He begotten and there is none like unto Him that You forgive me my sins for verily You are The Oft-Forgiving, Most-Merciful.)(AS-Samad: The Self-Sufficient Master, Possessor of perfect attributes whom all of creation turn to in all their needs.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aasaaluka yaa aallahu biaanaka alwaahidu alaahadu alsamadu aladhiy lam yalid walam ywlad walam yakn lahu kufuwaan aahadun aan taghfira liy dhunuwbiy iinaka aanta alghafuwru alrahiymu.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee as-aluka ya Allah bi-annakal-wahidul-ahadus-samad, allathee lam yalid walam yoolad, walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad, an taghfira lee thunoobee innaka antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ، الْمَنَّانُ، يَا بَدِيعَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ، يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You as unto You is all praise, none has the right to be worshipped except You, alone, without partner. You are the Benefactor. O Originator of the heavens and the Earth, O Possessor of majesty and honour, O Ever Living, O Self-Subsisting and Supporter of all, verily I ask You for Paradise and I take refuge with You from the Fire.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aasaaluka biaana laka alhamda laa iilaha iilaa aanta wahdaka laa shariyka laka almanaanu yaa badiy'a alsamawaati waalaardi yaa dhaa aljalaali waaliikraami yaa hayu yaa qayuwmu iiniy aasaaluka aljanaha waaa'uwdhu bika mina alnaari.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee as-aluka bianna lakal-hamd, la ilaha illa ant wahdaka la shareeka lak, almannan, ya badeeAAas-samawati wal-ard, ya thal-jalali wal-ikram, ya hayyu ya qayyoom, innee as-alukal-jannah, wa-aAAoothu bika minan-nar.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ)) .
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You, as I bear witness that You are Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except You, The One, AS-Samad Who begets not nor was He begotten and there is none like unto Him.)(AS-Samad: The Self-Sufficient Master, Possessor of perfect attributes whom all of creation turn to in all their needs.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aasaaluka biaanay aashhadu aanaka aanta allahu laa iilaha iilaa aanta alaahadu alsamadu aladhiy lam yalid walam yuwlad walam yakun lahu kufuwaan aahadun .
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma inne as-aluka biannee ashhadu annaka antal-lah, la ilaha illa ant, al-ahadus-samad, allathee lam yalid walam yoolad walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ (ثَلاَثَاً) اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلاَمُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلاَمُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ)).
adhkar.translation: (I ask Allah for forgiveness.(three times) (O Allah, You are As-Salam and from You is all peace, blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honour.) (AS-Salam: The One Who is free from all defects and deficiencies.))
adhkar.transliteration: aastaghfiru allaha thalaathaaan allahuma aanta alsalaamu waminka alsalaamu tabaarakta yaa dhaa aljalaali waaliikraami.
adhkar.instruction: (Astaghfirul-lah (three times) (Allahumma antas-salam waminkas-salam, tabarakta ya thal-jalali wal-ikram.))

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ [ثلاثاً]، اللَّهُمَّ لاَ مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَلاَ مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ، وَلاَ يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الجَدُّ)).
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.O Allah, none can prevent what You have willed to bestow and none can bestow what You have willed to prevent, and no wealth or majesty can benefit anyone, as from You is all wealth and majesty.)
adhkar.transliteration: la ilaha illa allah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer, allahumma la maniAAa lima aAAtayt, wala muAAtiya lima manaAAt, wala yanfaAAu thal-jaddi minkal-jad.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ، وَلَهُ الْحَمدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ، وَلاَ نَعْبُدُ إِلاَّ إِيَّاهُ, لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الكَافِرُونَ)).
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.  There is no might nor power except with Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except Allah and we worship none except Him.  For Him is all favour, grace, and glorious praise.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah and we are sincere in faith and devotion to Him although the disbelievers detest it.)
adhkar.transliteration: la ilaha illa allah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer. la hawla wala quwwata illa billah, la ilaha illal-lah, wala naAAbudu illa iyyah, lahun-niAAmatu walahul-fadl walahuth-thana-ol- hasan, la ilaha illal-lah mukhliseena lahud-deen walaw karihal-kafiroon.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (ثلاثاً وثلاثين) لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)).
adhkar.translation: (How perfect Allah is, all praise is for Allah, and Allah is the greatest.(thirty-three times) (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.))
adhkar.transliteration: subhaana allahi waalhamdu lilahi waallahu aakbaru thlathaan wthlathyn laa iilaha iilaa allahu wahdahu laa shariyka lahu lahu almulku walahu alhamdu wahuwa 'alaa kuli shay'in qadiyrun.
adhkar.instruction: (Subhanal-lah walhamdu lillah, wallahu akbar (thirty-three times). (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer.))

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ* اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ* لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ* وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ﴾، بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ* مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ* وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ* وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ* وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ﴾،بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ* مَلِكِ النَّاسِ* إِلَهِ النَّاسِ* مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ* الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ* مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَ النَّاسِ﴾ بَعْدَ كُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.
adhkar.translation: The following three Soorahs should be recited once after Zuhr, 'Asr and 'Ishaa prayers and thrice after the Fajr and Maghrib prayers.[Soorah al-Ikhlaas (112)] [Soorah al-Falaq (113)] [Soorah an-Naas (114)]
adhkar.transliteration: qul huwa allahu ahad (1) allahu samad (2) lam yalid wa lam yulad (3) wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad (4)

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ﴿اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لاَ تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلاَ نَوْمٌ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الأَرْضِ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاءَ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ﴾ عَقِبَ كلِّ صَلاَةٍ.
adhkar.translation: It is also from the Sunnah to recite Aayat ul-Kursee after each prayer:[Soorah al-Baqarah, Aayah 255]
adhkar.transliteration: allahu la ilaha illa huwa, al-hayyul-qayyum. la ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm. lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-ard. man dhal-ladhi yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi-idhnihi. ya'lamu ma bayna aydihim wa ma khalfahum. wa la yuhituna bishay'in min 'ilmihi illa bima sha'. wa si'a kursiyyuhu as-samawati wal-ard. wa la ya'udu-hu hifdhuhuma. wa huwa al-'aliyyul-'azim

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)) عَشْرَ مَرّاتٍ بَعْدَ صَلاةِ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالصُّبْحِ.
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, He gives life and causes death and He is over all things omnipotent.(ten times after the maghrib and fajr prayers))
adhkar.transliteration: la ilaha illa allah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, yuhyee wayumeet, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer.(ten times after the maghrib & fajr prayers))

adhkar.category_name: What to say after completing the prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نافِعاً، وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً، وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً)) بَعْدَ السّلامِ مِنْ صَلاَةِ الفَجْرِ.
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You for knowledge which is beneficial and sustenance which is good, and deeds which are acceptable.)(To be said after giving salam for the fajr prayer)
adhkar.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.(after salam from fajr prayer))

adhkar.arabic: قَالَ جَابرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا: كَانَ رسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم يُعَلِّمُنَا الْاسْتِخَارَةَ فِي الْأُمُورِ كُلِّهَا كَمَا يُعَلِّمُنَا السُّورَةَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ، يَقُولُ: ((إِذَا هَمَّ أَحَدُكُمْ بِالْأَمْرِ فَلْيَرْكَعْ رَكْعَتَيْنِ مِنْ غَيْرِ الْفَرِيضَةِ، ثُمَّ لْيَقُلْ: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ العَظِيمِ؛ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلاَ أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلاَ أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلاَّمُ الغُيُوبِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الأمْرَ - وَيُسَمِّي حَاجَتَهُ - خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي – أَوْ قَالَ: عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ - فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي – أَوْ قَالَ: عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ – فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ، ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ)).وَمَا نَدِمَ مَنِ اسْتَخَارَ الْخَالِقَ، وَشَاوَرَ الْمَخْلُوقِينَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَتَثَبَّتَ فِي أَمْرِهِ، فَقَدْ قَالَ اللَّه تعالى: ﴿وَشاوِرْهُمْ فِي الْأَمْرِ فَإِذَا عَزَمْتَ فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ﴾ .
adhkar.translation: (On the authority of Jabir Ibn AAabdullah , he said: ’The Prophet  would instruct us to pray for guidance in all of our concerns, just as he would teach us a chapter from the Quran.  He  would say ’ If any of you intends to undertake a matter then let him pray two supererogatory units (two rakAAah nafilah) of prayer and after which he should supplicate:‘O Allah, I seek Your counsel by Your knowledge and by Your power I seek strength and I ask You from Your immense favour, for verily You are able while I am not and verily You know while I do not and You are the Knower of the unseen.  O Allah, if You know this affair -and here he mentions his need- to be good for me in relation to my religion, my life, and end, then decree and facilitate it for me, and bless me with it, and if You know this affair to be ill for me towards my religion, my life, and end, then remove it from me and remove me from it, and decree for me what is good wherever it be and make me satisfied with such.)(One who seeks guidance from his Creator and consults his fellow believers and then remains firm in his resolve does not regret, for Allah has said:…and consult them in the affair. Then when you have taken a decision, put your trust in Allah…)
adhkar.transliteration: qaala jaabru bnu 'abdi allahi radiya allahu 'anhumaa: kaana rsuwlu allahi sla allh 'lyh wslm yu'alimunaa alastikhaaraha fiy alaumuwri kulihaa kamaa yu'alimunaa alsuwraha mina alquraani yaquwlu: iidhaa hama aahadukum bialaamri falyarka' rak'atayni min ghayri alfariydahi thum
adhkar.instruction: (On the authority of Jabir Ibn AAabdullah , he said: ’The Prophet  would instruct us to pray for guidance in all of our concerns, just as he would teach us a chapter from the Quran.  He  would say ’ If any of you intends to undertake a matter then let him pray two supererogatory units (two rakAAah nafilah) of prayer and after which he should supplicate:Allahumma innee astakheeruka biAAilmik, wa-astaqdiruka biqudratik, wa-as-aluka min fadlikal-AAatheem, fa-innaka taqdiru wala aqdir, wataAAlamu wala aAAlam ,wa-anta AAallamul ghuyoob, allahumma in kunta taAAlamu anna hathal-amr (say your need) khayrun lee fee deenee wamaAAashee waAAaqibati amree faqdurhu lee, wayassirhu lee, thumma barik lee feeh, wa-in kunta taAAlamu anna hathal-amr sharrun lee fee deenee wamaAAashee waAAaqibati amree fasrifhu AAannee wasrifnee AAanh, waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kan, thumma ardinee bih.)(One who seeks guidance from his Creator and consults his fellow believers and then remains firm in his resolve does not regret, for Allah has said:washawirhum fee al-amri fa-itha AAazamta fatawakkal AAala Allah)(chapter 3 verse 159)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation to say if you stir in the night
adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهّارُ، رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا الْعَزيزُ الْغَفَّارُ)).
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, The One, AL-Qahhar.Lord of the heavens and the Earth and all between them, The Exalted in Might, The Oft-Forgiving.)(AL-Qahhar:The One Who has subdued all of creation and Whom all of creation are subservient to.  All movements occur by His will.)
adhkar.transliteration: laa iilaha iilaa allahu alwaahidu alqaharu rabu alsamawaati waalaardi wamaa baynahumaa al'azyzu alghafaaru.
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illal-lahul-wahidul-qahhar, rabbus-samawati wama baynahuma, alAAazeezul-ghaffar.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say if you are afraid to go to sleep or feel lonely and depressed
adhkar.arabic: ((أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ، وَشَرِّ عِبَادِهِ، وَمِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّياطِينِ وَأَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ)).
adhkar.translation: (I take refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and punishment, and from the evil of His servants, and from the madness and appearance of devils.)
adhkar.transliteration: aa'uwdhu bikalimaati allahi altaamaati min ghadabihi wa'iqaabihi washari 'ibaadihi wamin hamazaati alshayatiyni waaan yahduruwni.
adhkar.instruction: (aAAoothu bikalimatil-lahit-tammat min ghadabih,waAAiqabih, washarri AAibadih, wamin hamazatish-shayateen, wa-an yahduroon.)

adhkar.category_name: What to do if you have a bad dream or nightmare
adhkar.arabic: ((يَنْفُثُ عَنْ يَسَارِهِ)) (ثلاثاً).
adhkar.translation: [((Spit on your left three times)(Spit: A form of spitting comprising mainly of air with little spittle)) - (Seek refuge in Allah from shaytan and the evil of what you saw (Three Times)) - (Do not relate it to anyone) - (Turn and sleep on the opposite side to which you were sleeping on previously.) - (Get up and pray if you so desire.) ]
adhkar.transliteration: yanfuthu 'an yasaarihi thlathaan.

adhkar.category_name: What to do if you have a bad dream or nightmare
adhkar.arabic: ((ويَقُومُ يُصَلِّي إِنْ أَرَادَ ذَلِكَ)).
adhkar.translation: (Get up and pray if you so desire.)
adhkar.transliteration: wyaquwmu yusaliy iin aaraada dhalika.

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for Qunut in the Witr prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ، وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ، وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ؛ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْضِي وَلاَ يُقْضَى عَلَيْكَ، إِنَّهُ لاَ يَذِلُّ مَنْ وَالَيْتَ، [وَلاَ يَعِزُّ مَنْ عَادَيْتَ]، تَبارَكْتَ رَبَّنا وَتَعَالَيْتَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, guide me along with those whom You have guided, pardon me along with those whom You have pardoned, be an ally to me along with those whom You are an ally to and bless for me that which You have bestowed.  Protect me from the evil You have decreed for verily You decree and none can decree over You.For surety, he whom you show allegiance to is never abased and he whom You take as an enemy is never honoured and mighty. O our Lord, Blessed and Exalted are You.)(Evil you have decreed: Allah does not create pure evil which does not have any good or contain any benefit, wisdom or mercy at all, nor does He punish anyone without having commited a sin. Something can be good in terms of its creation when viewed in a particular perspective and at the same time be evil when viewed in another way.Allah created the devil and by him, He tests His servants, so there are those who hate the devil, fight him and his way and they stand at enmity towards him and his followers and there are others who are at allegiance with the devil and follow his steps. So evil exists in His creatures by His will and wisdom, not in His actions or act of creating.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma ahdiniy fiyman hadayta wa'aafiniy fiyman 'aafayta watawalaniy fiyman tawalayta wabaarik liy fiymaa aa'tayta waqiniy shara maa qadayta faiinaka taqdiy walaa yuqdaa 'alayka iinahu laa yadhilu man waalayta walaa ya'izu man 'aadayta tabarakta rabana wata'a
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummah-dinee feeman hadayt, waAAafinee feeman AAafayt, watawallanee feeman tawallayt, wabarik lee feema aAAtayt, waqinee sharra ma qadayt, fa-innaka taqdee wala yuqda AAalayk, innahu la yathillu man walayt, [wala yaAAizzu man AAadayt], tabarakta rabbana wataAAalayt.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for Qunut in the Witr prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ، وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ، وَأَعُــــوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ، لاَ أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ، أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I take refuge within Your pleasure from Your displeasure and within Your pardon from Your punishment, and I take refuge in You from You. I cannot enumerate Your praise. You are as You have praised Yourself.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aa'uwdhu biridaaka min sakhatika wabimu'aafaatika min 'uquwbatika waaa'uwdhu bika minka laa auhsiy thanaa'an 'alayka aanta kamaa aathnayta 'alaa nafsika.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu biridaka min sakhatik, wabimuAAafatika min AAuqoobatik, wa-aAAoothu bika mink, la ohsee thana-an AAalayk, anta kama athnayta AAala nafsik.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for Qunut in the Witr prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِيَّاكَ نعْبُدُ، وَلَكَ نُصَلِّي وَنَسْجُدُ، وَإِلَيْكَ نَسْعَى وَنَحْفِدُ، نَرْجُو رَحْمَتَكَ، وَنَخْشَى عَذَابَكَ، إِنَّ عَذَابَكَ بِالكَافِرِينَ مُلْحَقٌ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْتَعينُكَ، وَنَسْتَغْفِرُكَ، وَنُثْنِي عَلَيْكَ الْخَيْرَ، وَلاَ نَكْفُرُكَ، وَنُؤْمِنُ بِكَ، وَنَخْضَعُ لَكَ، وَنَخْلَعُ مَنْ يَكْفرُكَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, it is You we worship, and unto You we pray and prostrate, and towards You we hasten and You we serve. We hope for Your mercy and fear Your punishment, verily Your punishment will fall upon the disbelievers.O Allah, we seek Your aid and ask Your pardon, we praise You with all good and do not disbelieve in You.We believe in You and submit unto You, and we disown and reject those who disbelieve in You.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiyaaka n'budu walaka nusaliy wanasjudu waiilayka nas'aa wanahfidu narjuw rahmataka wanakhshaa 'adhaabaka iina 'adhaabaka bialkaafiriyna mulhaqun. allahuma iinaa nasta'ynuka wanastaghfiruka wanuthniy 'alayka alkhayra walaa nakfuruka wanuminu bika wanakhda'u la
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma iyyaka naAAbud, walaka nusallee wanasjud, wa-ilayka nasAAa wanahfid, narjoo rahmatak, wanakhsha AAathabak, inna AAathabaka bilkafireena mulhaq. Allahumma inna nastaAAeenuk, wanastaghfiruk, wanuthnee AAalaykal- khayr, wala nakfuruk, wanu/minu bik, wanakhdaAAu lak wanakhlaAAu man yakfuruk.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say immediately following the Witr prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ المَلِكِ القُدُّوسِ)) ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ والثَّالِثَةُ يَجْهَرُ بها ويَمُدُّ بها صَوتَهُ يقولُ: [رَبِّ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ وَالرُّوحِ])).
adhkar.translation: (How perfect The King, The Holy One is.(three times) on the third time he would raise his voice, elongate it and add: (Lord of the angles and the Rooh (i.e. Jibra-eel).))
adhkar.transliteration: subhaana almaliki alquduwsi thlatha mraatin walthaalithahu yajharu bha wyamudu bha sawtahu yqwlu: rabi almalaaikahi waalruwhi.
adhkar.instruction: (Subhanal-malikil-quddoos.(three times).on the third time he would raise his voice, elongate it and add: (Rabbil-mala-ikati warrooh.))

adhkar.category_name: Invocations in times of worry and grief
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُــــلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ، سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ، أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ، أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ القُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي، وَنُورَ صَدْرِي، وَجَلاَءَ حُزْنِي، وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your maidservant, my forelock is in Your hand (i.e. You have total mastery over), Your command over me is forever executed and Your decree over me is just. I ask You by every name belonging to You which You named Yourself with, or revealed in Your Book, or You taught to any of Your creation, or You have preserved in the knowledge of the unseen with You, that You make the Quran the life of my heart and the light of my breast, and a departure for my sorrow and a release for my anxiety.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy 'abduka abnu 'abdika abnu aamatika naasiyatiy biyadika maadin fiya hukmuka 'adlun fiya qadaauka aasaaluka bikuli asmin huwa laka samayta bihi nafsaka aaw aanzaltahu fiy kitaabika aaw 'alamtahu aahadaan min khalqika aawi astaatharta bihi fiy 'ilm
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee AAabduk, ibnu AAabdik, ibnu amatik, nasiyatee biyadik, madin fiyya hukmuk, AAadlun fiyya qada-ok, as-aluka bikulli ismin huwa lak, sammayta bihi nafsak, aw anzaltahu fee kitabik, aw AAallamtahu ahadan min khalqik awis-ta/tharta bihi fee AAilmil-ghaybi AAindak, an tajAAalal-Qurana rabeeAAa qalbee, wanoora sadree, wajalaa huznee wathahaba hammee.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations in times of worry and grief
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being over powered by men.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aa'uwdhu bika mina alhami waalhazani waal'ajzi waalkasali waalbukhli waaljubni wadala'i aldayni waghalabahi alrijaali.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasali walbukhli waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal.)

adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ)).
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah Forbearing.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the magnificent throne.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the Earth and Lord of the noble throne.)
adhkar.transliteration: laa iilaha iilaa allahu al'aziymu alhaliymu laa iilaha iilaa allahu rabu al'arshi al'aziymi laa iilaha iilaa allahu rabu alsamawaati warabu alaardi warabu al'arshi alkariymi.
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illal-lahul-AAatheemul-haleem, la ilaha illal-lahu rabbul-AAarshil-AAatheem, la ilaha illal-lahu  rabbus-samawati warabbul-ardi warabbul-AAarshil-kareem.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو، فَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, it is Your mercy that I hope for, so do not leave me in charge of my affairs even for a blink of an eye and rectify for me all of my affairs.None has the right to be worshipped except You.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma rahmataka aarjuw falaa takilniy iilaa nafsiy tarfaha 'aynin waaaslih liy shaaniy kulahu laa iilaha iilaa aanta.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma rahmataka arjoo fala takilnee ila nafsee tarfata AAayn, wa-aslih lee sha/nee kullah, la ilaha illa ant.)

adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظّالِمِينَ)).
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.)
adhkar.transliteration: laa iilaha iilaa aanta subhaanaka iiniy kuntu mina alzalimiyna.
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu minath-thalimeen.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُ اللَّهُ رَبِّي لاَ أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئاً)).
adhkar.translation: (Allah, Allah is my Lord, I do not associate anything with Him.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahu allahu rabiy laa aushriku bihi shayaan.
adhkar.instruction: (None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِم، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, we place You before them and we take refuge in You from their evil.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iinaa naj'aluka fiy nuhuwrihim wana'uwdhu bika min shuruwrihim.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي، وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ، وَبِكَ أُقاتِلُ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, You are my supporter and You are my helper, by You I move and by You I attack and by You I battle.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aanta 'adudiy waaanta nasiyriy bika aahuwlu wabika aasuwlu wabika auqatilu.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
adhkar.arabic: ((حَسْبُنا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ)).
adhkar.translation: (Allah is sufficient for us, and how fine a trustee (He is).)
adhkar.transliteration: hasbuna allahu wani'ma alwakiylu.
adhkar.instruction: (Hasbunal-lahu waniAAmal-wakeel.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations against the oppression of rulers
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ ربَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ، وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، كُنْ لِي جَاراً مِنْ فُلاَنِ بْنِ فُلاَنٍ، وَأَحْزَابِهِ مِنْ خَلاَئِقِكَ، أَنْ يَفْرُطَ عَلَيَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْهُمْ أَوْ يَطْغَى، عَزَّ جَارُكَ، وَجَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ، وَلاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
adhkar.translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens, Lord of the Magnificent Throne,  be for me a support against [such and such a person] and his helpers from among your creatures, lest any of them abuse me or do me wrong. Mighty is your patronage and glorious are your praises. There is none worthy of worship but you.
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma rba alsamawaati alsab'i waraba al'arshi al'aziymi kun liy jaaraan min fulaani bni fulaanin waaahzaabihi min khalaaiqika aan yafruta 'alaya aahadun minhum aaw yatghaa 'aza jaaruka wajala thanaauka walaa iilaha iilaa aanta.
adhkar.instruction: Allaahumma rabbas-samaawaatis-sab'i, wa Rabbal-'Arshil-'Adheem, Kun lee jaaran min (here you mention the person's name) wa 'ahzabihi min khalaa'iqika, 'an yafruta 'alayya 'ahadun minhum 'aw yatghaa,'Azza jaaruka, wa jalla thanaa'uka, wa laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta.

adhkar.category_name: Invocations against the oppression of rulers
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَعَزُّ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ جَمِيعاً، اللَّهُ أَعَزُّ مِمَّا أَخَافُ وَأَحْذَرُ، أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ الَّذِي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ، الْمُمْسِكِ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ أَنْ يَقَعْنَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ، مِنْ شَرِّ عَبْدِكَ فُلاَنٍ، وَجُنُودِهِ وَأَتْبَاعِهِ وَأَشْيَاعِهِ، مِنْ الْجِنِّ وَالإِنْسِ، اللَّهُمَّ كُنْ لِي جَاراً مِنْ شَرِّهِمْ، جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَعَزَّ جَارُكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَلاَ إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
adhkar.translation: Allah is the Most Great, Mightier than all His creation. He is Mightier than what fear and dread. I seek refuge in Allah, Who there is none worthy of worship but Him. He is the One Who holds the seven heavens from falling upon the earth except by His command. [I seek refuge in You Allah] from the evil of Your slave [name of the person], and his helpers, his followers and his supporters from among the jinn and mankind. O Allah, be my support against their evil. Glorious Your praises and mighty is Your patronage. Blessed is Your Name, there is no true God but You. (Recite three times in Arabic)
adhkar.transliteration: allahu aakbaru allahu aa'azu min khalqihi jamiy'aan allahu aa'azu mimaa aakhaafu waaahdharu aa'uwdhu biallahi aladhiy laa iilaha iilaa huwa almumsiki alsamawaati alsab'i aan yaqa'na 'alaa alaardi iilaa biiidhnihi min shari 'abdika fulaanin wajunuwdihi waaatbaa'ihi waaashya
adhkar.instruction: Allaahu Akbar, Allaahu 'a'azzu min khalqihi jamee'an, Allaahu 'a'azzu mimmaa 'akhaafu wa 'ahdharu, 'a'oothu billaahil-lathee laa ilaaha illaa huwa, almumsikis-samaawaatis-sab'i 'an yaqa'na 'alaal-'ardhi 'illaa bi'ithnihi, min sharri 'abdika (name of the person) wa junoodihi wa 'atbaa'ihi wa ashyaa'ihi minal-jinni wal'insi, Allaahumma kun lee jaaran min sharrihim, Jalla thanaa'uka wa 'azza aaruka, wa tabaarakasmuka, wa laa ilaaha ghayruka.

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الْكِتَابِ، سَرِيعَ الْحِسَابِ، اهْزِمِ الأَحْزَابَ، اللَّهُمَّ اهزِمْهُمْ وَزَلْزِلْهُمْ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, Revealer of the Book, Swift at reckoning, defeat the confederates. O Allah, defeat them and convulse them.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma munzila alkitaabi sariy'a alhisaabi ahzimi alaahzaaba allahuma ahzimhum wazalzilhum.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma munzilal-kitab, sareeAAal-hisab, ihzimil-ahzab, allahummah-zimhum wazalzilhum.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say if you fear people may harm you
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, protect me from them with what You choose.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma akfiniyhim bimaa shita.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummak-fineehim bima shi/.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for if you are stricken by in your faith
adhkar.arabic: ((يَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللَّهِ و يَنْتَهِي عَمَّا شك فِيهِ)).
adhkar.transliteration: yasta'iydhu biallahi w yantahiy 'amaa shk fiyhi.
adhkar.instruction: (Say:) I seek refuge in Allah. (Then you should desist from doing what you are in doubt about.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for if you are stricken by in your faith
adhkar.arabic: ((يَقُولُ: ((آمَنْتُ بِاللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (He should say: (I have believed in Allah and His Messenger.))
adhkar.transliteration: yaquwlu: aamantu biallahi warusulihi.
adhkar.instruction: (He should say: ( Amantu billahi warusulih.))

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for if you are stricken by in your faith
adhkar.arabic: ((يَقْرَأُ قَوْلَهُ تَعَالَى: ﴿هُوَ الْأوَّلُ وَالْآخِرُ وَالظّاهِرُ وَالْباطِنُ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ﴾)).
adhkar.translation: (He should also recite the following verse: (He is The First and The Last, Aththahir and Al-Batin and He knows well all things.)(ththahir: Indicates the greatness of His attributes and the insignificance of every single creation in respect to His greatness and Highness, for He is above all of His creation as regards His essence and attributes.)(Al-Batin: Indicates His awareness and knowledge of all secrets, of that which is in the hearts and the most intimate of things just as it indicates His closeness and nearness to all in a manner which befits His majesty.))
adhkar.transliteration: yaqraau qawlahu ta'aalaa: huwa alawalu waalaakhiru waalzahiru waalbatinu wahuwa bikuli shay'in 'aliymun.
adhkar.instruction: (He should also recite the following verse: ( Huwa al-awwalu, waal-akhiru, waalththahiru waalbatinu wahuwa bikulli shayin AAaleem))

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for the setting of a debt
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكِ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, make what is lawful enough for me, as opposed to what is unlawful, and spare me by Your grace, of need of others.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahummakfini bi halalika 'an haramik, wa aghnini bi fadlika 'amman siwak
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for the setting of a debt
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being over powered by men.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aa'uwdhu bika mina alhami waalhazani waal'ajzi waalkasali waalbukhli waaljubni wadala'i aldayni waghalabahi alrijaali.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasal, walbukhl, waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation against the distractions of Satan during the prayer and recitation of the Quran
adhkar.arabic: ((أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ، وَاتْفُلْ عَلَى يَسَارِكَ (ثلاثاً))).
adhkar.translation: (othman Ibn Al-AAas  narrated: I said ‘O Messenger of Allah, verily the devil comes between me and my prayer and recitation making me confused’ The Messenger of Allah  replied ‘That is a devil called Khanzab, so if you sense his presence then seek refuge in Allah from him and spit (A form of spitting comprising mainly of air with little spittle) on your left side three times.)
adhkar.transliteration: aa'uwdhu biallahi mina alshaytaani alrajiymi waatful 'alaa yasaarika thlathaan.

adhkar.category_name: Invocation for when you find something becoming difficult for you
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, there is no ease except in that which You have made easy, and You make the difficulty, if You wish, easy.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma la sahla illa ma jaAAaltahu sahla, wa-anta tajAAalul- hazana in shi'ta sahla.)

adhkar.category_name: What to say and do if you commit a sin
adhkar.arabic: ((مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ يُذنِبُ ذَنْباً فَيُحْسِنُ الطُّهُورَ، ثُمَّ يَقُومُ فَيُصَلِّي رَكْعَتَيْنِ، ثُمَّ يَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ إِلاَّ غَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (Any servant who commits a sin and as a result, performs ablution, prays two units of prayer (i.e. two rakAAas) and then seeks Allah’s forgiveness, Allah would forgive him.)
adhkar.transliteration: maa min 'abdin yudhnibu dhanbaan fayuhsinu altuhuwra thuma yaquwmu fayusaliy rak'atayni thuma yastaghfiru allaha iilaa ghafara allahu lahu.

adhkar.category_name: Invocations against the Devil and his promptings
adhkar.arabic: ((الْاسْتِعَاذَةُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْهُ)).
adhkar.translation: Seeking refuge from him.
adhkar.transliteration: alasti'aadhahu biallahi minhu.

adhkar.category_name: Invocations against the Devil and his promptings
adhkar.arabic: الْأَذَانُ
adhkar.translation: The Adhaan [call to prayer].
adhkar.transliteration: alaadhaanu

adhkar.category_name: Invocations against the Devil and his promptings
adhkar.arabic: ((الْأَذْكَارُ وَقِرَاءَةُ الْقُرْآنِ)).
adhkar.translation: (Recitation of the Quran and the authentic texts of remembrance and supplications.)(e.g. ‘Do not make your homes like the graveyards, indeed the devils flee from the house in which soorat Al-Baqarah has been read’ related by Muslim 1/539, also supplication and remembrance for the morning & evening, before sleep, when getting up, entering and leaving the toilet, entering and leaving the mosque, the recitation of ayat Al-kursiyy and the last two verses of soorat Al-Baqarah before sleeping, the athan…etc.)
adhkar.transliteration: alaadhkaaru waqiraa'ahu alquraani.

adhkar.category_name: Invocation for when something you dislike happens, or for when you fail to achieve what you attempt to do
adhkar.arabic: ((قَدَرُ اللَّهُ وَمَا شَاءَ فَعَلَ)).
adhkar.translation: (Allah has decreed and what He wills, He does.)(for verily ‘If’ lets in the work of the devil.)
adhkar.transliteration: qadaru allahu wamaa shaa'a fa'ala.
adhkar.instruction: (Qaddaral-lah, wama shaa faAAal.)

adhkar.category_name: Congratulations for new parents and how they should respond
adhkar.arabic: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي الْمَوْهُوبِ لَكَ، وَشَكَرْتَ الْوَاهِبَ، وَبَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ، وَرُزِقْتَ بِرَّهُ)). وَيَرُدُّ عَلَيْهِ الْمُهَــــــنَّأُ فَيَقُولُ: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ، وَجَزَاكَ اللَّهُ خَيْراً، وَرَزَقَكَ اللَّهُ مِثْلَهُ، وَأَجْزَلَ ثَوَابَكَ)).
adhkar.translation: May Allah bless you with His gift to you and may you (the new parent) give thanks, may the child reach the maturity of years, and may you be granted its righteousness. The reply of the person being congratulated is to say: May Allah bless you, and shower His blessings upon you, and may Allah reward you well and bestow upon you its like and reward you abundantly
adhkar.transliteration: baaraka allahu laka fiy almawhuwbi laka washakarta alwaahiba wabalagha aashudahu waruziqta birahu. wayarudu 'alayhi almuhanaau fayaquwlu: baaraka allahu laka wabaaraka 'alayka wajazaaka allahu khayraan warazaqaka allahu mithlahu waaajzala thawaabaka.
adhkar.instruction: Baarakallaahu laka fil-mawhoobi laka, wa shakartal-waahiba, wa balagha 'ashuddahu, wa ruzigta birrahu.  The reply of the person being congratulated is to say: Baarakallahu laka wa baaraka 'alayka, wa jazaakallaahu khayran, wa razaqakallaahu mithlahu, wa 'ajzala thawaabaka.

adhkar.category_name: How to seek Allah's protection for children
adhkar.arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم يُعَوِّذُ الحَسَنَ وَالحُسَينَ رضي الله عنهما ((أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لاَمَّةٍ)).
adhkar.translation: (Ibn AAabbas related that the Messenger of Allah  used to commend Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn to Allah’s protection, saying:(I commend you two to the protection of Allah’s perfect words from every devil, vermin, and every evil eye.))
adhkar.transliteration: kaana rasuwlu allahi sla allh 'lyh wslm yu'awidhu alhasana waalhusayna rdy allh 'nhma au'iydhukumaa bikalimaati allahi altaamahi min kuli shaytaanin wahaamahin wamin kuli 'aynin laamahin.
adhkar.instruction: (Ibn AAabbas related that the Messenger of Allah  used to commend Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn to Allah’s protection, saying:(OAAeethukuma bikalimatil-lahit-tammah, min kulli shaytanin wahammah, wamin kulli AAaynin lammah.))

adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ بأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (Never mind, may it (the sickness) be a purification, if Allah wills.)
adhkar.transliteration: laa basa tahuwrun iin shaa'a allahu.
adhkar.instruction: (La ba'sa tahoorun in shaal-lah.)

adhkar.arabic: ((أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْعَظيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفيَكَ)) (سبع مرات).
adhkar.translation: (I ask Allah The Supreme, Lord of the magnificent throne to cure you’.(7times) (he (the sick person) will be cured.))
adhkar.transliteration: aasaalu allaha al'azyma raba al'arshi al'aziymi aan yashfyaka sb' mrat.
adhkar.instruction: (Asalul-lahal-AAatheem rabbal-AAarshil-AAatheem an yashfeek (7times).)

adhkar.category_name: The reward for visiting the sick
adhkar.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: ((إِذَا عَادَ الرَّجُلُ أَخَاهُ الْمُسْلِمَ مَشَى فِي خِرَافَةِ الْجَنَّةِ حَتَّى يَجْلِسَ، فَإِذَا جَلَسَ غَمَرَتْهُ الرَّحْمَةُ، فَإِنْ كَانَ غُدْوَةً صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ حَتَّى يُمْسِيَ، وَإِنْ كَانَ مَسَاءً صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ حَتَّى يُصْبِحَ)).
adhkar.translation: (Ali Ibn Abee Talib  related that he heard the Messenger of Allah  say: ‘If a man calls on his sick Muslim brother, it is as if he walks reaping the fruits of Paradise until he sits, and when he sits he is showered in mercy, and if this was in the morning, seventy thousand angles send prayers upon him until the evening, and if this was in the evening, seventy thousand angles send prayers upon him until the morning.)
adhkar.transliteration: qaala alnabiyu sla allh 'lyh wslm: iidhaa 'aada alrajulu aakhaahu almuslima mashaa fiy khiraafahi aljanahi hataa yajlisa faiidhaa jalasa ghamarathu alrahmahu faiin kaana ghudwahan salaa 'alayhi sab'uwna aalfa malakin hataa yumsiya waiin kaana masaa'an salaa 'alayhi sab'uwna aalfa

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالرَّفِيقِ الْأَعْلَى)).
adhkar.translation: ‘O Allaah, forgive me, have mercy upon me and unite me with the highest companions
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir liy waarhamniy waaalhiqniy bialrafiyqi alaa'laa.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummagh-fir lee, warhamnee wa-alhiqnee birrafeeqil-aAAla.)

adhkar.arabic: ((جَعَلَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عِنْدَ مَوْتِهِ يُدْخِلُ يَدَيْهِ فِي الْمَاءِ فَيَمْسَحُ بِهِمَا وَجْهَهُ، وَيَقُولُ: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ إِنَّ لِلْمَوْتِ سَكَرَاتٍ)).
adhkar.translation: 'Aa.ishah (radhi-yAllaahu 'anhaa) related that The Prophet (sal-Allaahu 'alayhe wa sallam) [during his illness in which he passed away] would dip his hands in water and then he would wipe his face and say: ‘None has the right to be worshipped except Allaah, death does indeed contain agony.’
adhkar.transliteration: ja'ala alnabiyu sla allh 'lyh wslm 'inda mawtihi yudkhilu yadayhi fiy almaa'i fayamsahu bihimaa wajhahu wayaquwlu: laa iilaha iilaa allahu iina lilmawti sakaraatin.
adhkar.instruction: 'Aa.ishah (radhi-yAllaahu 'anhaa) related that The Prophet (sal-Allaahu 'alayhe wa sallam) [during his illness in which he passed away] would dip his hands in water and then he would wipe his face and say:[La ilaha illal-lah, inna lilmawti lasakarat.] ‘None has the right to be worshipped except Allaah, death does indeed contain agony.’

adhkar.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ لَهُ المُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah and Allah is the greatest.None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone.None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner.None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah and there is no might and no power except with Allah.)
adhkar.transliteration: laa iilaha iilaa allahu waallahu aakbaru laa iilaha iilaa allahu wahdahu laa iilaha iilaa allahu wahdahu laa shariyka lahu laa iilaha iilaa allahu lahu almulku walahu alhamdu laa iilaha iilaa allahu walaa hawla walaa quwaha iilaa biallahi.
adhkar.instruction: (La ilaha illal-lah, wallahu akbar, la ilaha illal-lahu wahdah, la shareeka lah, la ilaha illal-lahu lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, la ilaha illal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.)

adhkar.category_name: What to encourage the dying person to say
adhkar.arabic: ((مَنْ كَانَ آخِرُ كَلاَمِهِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ)).
adhkar.translation: i.e. those around the sick should instruct and encourage him to say the shahadah. (He whose last words are: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah.) will enter Paradise.)
adhkar.transliteration: man kaana aakhiru kalaamihi laa iilaha iilaa allahu dakhala aljanaha.
adhkar.instruction: i.e. those around the sick should instruct and encourage him to say the shahadah. (He whose last words are: (La ilaha illal-lah.) will enter Paradise.)

adhkar.arabic: ((إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي، وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرَاً مِنْهَا)).
adhkar.translation: (To Allah we belong and unto Him is our return.O Allah, recompense me for my affliction and replace it for me with something better.)
adhkar.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un. allahumma'jurni fi musibati wa akhlif li khayran minha
adhkar.instruction: (Inna lillahi wa-inna ilayhi rajiAAoon, allahumma/- jurnee fee museebatee wakhluf lee khayran minha.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation for closing the eyes of the dead
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِفُلاَنٍ (بِاسْمِهِ) وَارْفَعْ دَرَجَتَهُ فِي الْمَهْدِيِّينَ، وَاخْلُفْهُ فِي عَقِبِهِ فِي الْغَابِرِينَ، وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلَهُ  يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ، وَافْسَحْ لَهُ فِي قَبْرِهِ، وَنَوِّرْ لَهُ فِيهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, forgive -here the name of the deceased is mentioned- and raise his rank among the rightly guided, and be a successor to whom he has left behind, and forgive us and him O Lord of the worlds.  Make spacious his grave and illuminate it for him.)(A successor: one who succeeds another due to the latter’s absence or death. This is the correct meaning of the word khaleefah; thus, it is incorrect to believe that Adam is the khaleefah (vicegerent, as is commonly translated) of Allah on earth because Allah is never absent, and will never die.  This supplication proves the correct understanding of this term and shows that Allah succeeds us and guards whom we leave behind when we die or are absent (also refer to supplication #198).)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir lifulaanin biasmihi waarfa' darajatahu fiy almahdiyiyna waakhlufhu fiy 'aqibihi fiy alghaabiriyna waaghfir lanaa walahu yaa raba al'aalamiyna waafsah lahu fiy qabrihi wanawir lahu fiyhi.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummagh-fir li-name the dead- warfaAA darajatahu fil-mahdiyyeen, wakhlufhu fee AAaqibihi fil-ghabireen, waghfir lana walahu ya rabbal-AAalameen wafsah lahu fee qabrih, wanawwir lahu feeh.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for the dead in the Funeral prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ، وَعَافِهِ، وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ، وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ، وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَاراً خَيْراً مِنْ دَارِهِ، وَأَهْلاً خَيْراً مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، وَزَوْجَاً خَيْراً مِنْ زَوْجِهِ، وَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ، وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ [وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ])).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, forgive and have mercy upon him, excuse him and pardon him, and make honourable his reception. Expand his entry, and cleanse him with water, snow, and ice, and purify him of sin as a white robe is purified of filth.  Exchange his home for a better home, and his family for a better family, and his spouse for a better spouse. Admit him into the Garden, protect him from the punishment of the grave and the torment of the Fire.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir lahu waarhamhu wa'aafihi waa'fu 'anhu waaakrim nuzulahu wawasi' mudkhalahu waaghsilhu bialmaa'i waalthalji waalbaradi wanaqihi mina alkhataayaa kamaa naqayta althawba alaabyada mina aldanasi waaabdilhu daaraan khayraan min daarihi waaahlaan khayraan min
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummagh-fir lahu warhamh, waAAafihi, waAAfu AAanh, wa-akrim nuzulah, wawassiAA mudkhalah, waghsilhu bilma-i waththalji walbarad, wanaqqihi minal-khataya kama naqqaytath-thawbal-abyada minad-danas, wa-abdilhu daran khayran min darih, wa-ahlan khayran min ahlih wazawjan khayran min zawjih, wa-adkhilhul-jannah, wa-aAAithhu min AAathabil-qabr, waAAathabin-nar)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for the dead in the Funeral prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِحَيِّنَا وَمَيِّتِنَا، وَشَاهِدِنَا وَغَائِبِنَا، وَصَغِيرِنَا وَكَبيرِنَا، وَذَكَرِنَا وَأُنْثَانَا. اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ أَحْيَيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَأَحْيِهِ عَلَى الْإِسْلاَمِ، وَمَنْ تَوَفَّيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَتَوَفَّهُ عَلَى الإِيمَانِ، اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَحْرِمْنَا أَجْرَهُ، وَلاَ تُضِلَّنَا بَعْدَهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, forgive our living and our dead, those present and those absent, our young and our old, our males and our females.  O Allah, whom amongst us You keep alive, then let such a life be upon Islam, and whom amongst us You take unto Yourself, then let such a death be upon faith.  O Allah, do not deprive us of his reward and do not let us stray after him.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir lihayinaa wamayitinaa washaahidinaa waghaaibinaa wasaghiyrinaa wakabyrinaa wadhakarinaa waaunthaanaa. allahuma man aahyaytahu minaa faaahyihi 'alaa aliislaami waman tawafaytahu minaa fatawafahu 'alaa aliiymaani allahuma laa tahrimnaa aajrahu walaa tudila
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummagh-fir lihayyina wamayyitina washahidina, wagha-ibina, wasagheerina wakabeerina, wathakarina wa-onthana. Allahumma man ahyaytahu minna fa-ahyihi AAalal-islam, waman tawaffaytahu minna fatawaffahu AAalal-eeman, allahumma la tahrimna ajrah, wala tudillana baAAdah.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for the dead in the Funeral prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ فُلاَنَ بْنَ فُلاَنٍ فِي ذِمَّتِكَ، وَحَبْلِ جِوَارِكَ، فَقِهِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْقَبْرِ، وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ الْوَفَاءِ وَالْحَقِّ، فَاغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الغَفُورُ الرَّحيمُ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, so-and-so is under Your care and protection so protect him from the trial of the grave and torment of the Fire.  Indeed You are faithful and truthful. Forgive and have mercy upon him, surely You are The Oft-Forgiving, The Most-Merciful.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iina fulaana bna fulaanin fiy dhimatika wahabli jiwaarika faqihi min fitnahi alqabri wa'adhaabi alnaari waaanta aahlu alwafaa'i waalhaqi faaghfir lahu waarhamhu iinaka aanta alghafuwru alrahymu.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma inna -name the dead- fee thimmatik, wahabli jiwarik, faqihi min fitnatil-qabr waAAathabin-nar, wa-anta ahlul-wafa/, walhaq, faghfir lahu warhamh, innaka antal-ghafoorur-raheem.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for the dead in the Funeral prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ عَبْدُكَ وَابْنُ أَمَتِكَ احْتَاجَ إِلَى رَحْمَتِكَ، وَأَنْتَ غَنِيٌّ عَنْ عَذَابِهِ، إِنْ كَانَ مُحْسِناً فَزِدْ فِي حَسَنَاتِهِ، وَإِنْ كَانَ مُسِيئاً فَتَجَاوَزْ عَنْهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, Your servant and the son of Your maidservant is in need of Your mercy and You are without need of his punishment. If he was righteous then increase his reward and if he was wicked then look over his sins.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma 'abduka waabnu aamatika ahtaaja iilaa rahmatika waaanta ghaniyun 'an 'adhaabihi iin kaana muhsinaan fazid fiy hasanaatihi waiin kaana musiyaan fatajaawaz 'anhu.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma AAabduka wabnu amatik, ihtaja ila rahmatik, wa-anta ghaniyyun AAan AAathabih, in kana muhsinan fazid fee hasanatih, wa-in kana museean fatajawaz AAanh.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for a child in the Funeral prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ)) وإن قال: ((اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ فَرَطاً وَذُخْراً لِوَالِدَيْهِ، وَشَفِيعاً مُجَاباً، اللَّهُمَّ ثَقِّلْ بِهِ مَوَازِينَهُمَا، وَأَعْظِمْ بِهِ أُجورَهُمَا، وَأَلْحِقْهُ بِصَالِحِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ، وَاجْعَلْهُ فِي كَفَالَةِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَقِهِ بِرَحْمَتِكَ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ، وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَاراً خَيْراً مِنْ دَارِهِ، وَأَهْلاً خَيْراً مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِأَسْلاَفِنَا، وَأَفْرَاطِنَا، وَمَنْ سَبَقَنَا بِالْإِيمَانِ)) إن قال ذلك فَحَسَنٌ.
adhkar.translation: O Allah, protect him from the torment of the grave . [it is also good to say] O Allah, make him a precursor, a forerunner and a treasure for his parents and an answered intercessor. O Allah, make him weigh heavily in their scales (of good)  and magnify their reward. Make him join the righteous of the believers. Place him in the care of Ibrahim. Save him by Your mercy from the torment of Hell. Give him a home better than his home and a family better than his family. O Allah, forgive those who have gone (i.e. passed away) before us, our children lost (by death), and those who have preceded us in Faith.
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aa'idhhu min 'adhaabi alqabri win qal: allahuma aj'alhu farataan wadhukhraan liwaalidayhi washafiy'aan mujaabaan allahuma thaqil bihi mawaaziynahumaa waaa'zim bihi aujwrahumaa waaalhiqhu bisaalihi almuminiyna waaj'alhu fiy kafaalahi iibraahiyma waqihi birahmatika
adhkar.instruction: (Allaahumma 'a'ith-hu min 'athaabil-qabri.) [or say:](Allahummaj-AAalhu faratan, wathukhran liwalidayh, washafeeAAan mujaban. Allahumma thaqqil bihi mawazeenahuma wa-aAAthim bihi ojoorahuma, wa-alhiqhu bisalihil-mu'mineen, wajAAalhu fee kafalati Ibraheem, waqihi birahmatika AAathabal-jaheem, wa 'abdilhu daaran khayran min daarihi, wa 'ahlan khayran min 'ahlihi, Allaahum-maghfir li'aslaafinaa, wa afraatinaa wa man sabaqanaa bil'eemaan)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for a child in the Funeral prayer
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ لَنَا فَرَطاً، وَسَلَفاً، وَأَجْراً)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, make him for us a precursor,a forerunner and a cause of reward)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aj'alhu lanaa farataan wasalafaan waaajraan.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummaj-AAalhu lana farata, wasalafan wa-ajra.)

adhkar.arabic: ((إِنَّ للَّهِ مَا أَخَذَ، وَلَهُ مَا أَعْطَى، وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ عِنْدَهُ بِأَجَلٍ مُسَمَّى... فَلْتَصْبِرْ وَلْتَحْتَسِبْ)). وَإِنْ قَالَ: ((أَعْظَمَ اللَّهُ أَجْرَكَ، وَأَحْسَنَ عَزَاءَكَ، وَغَفَرَ لِمَيِّتِكَ)) فَحَسَنٌ.
adhkar.translation: (Verily to Allah, belongs what He took and to Him belongs what He gave, and everything with Him has an appointed time…and then he  ordered for her to be patient and hope for Allah’s reward.)(The words (faltasbir waltahtasib) are commands in the feminine 3rd person form, so they will need to be changed in respect to whom is being addressed.)
adhkar.transliteration: iina llahi maa aakhadha walahu maa aa'taa wakulu shay'in 'indahu biaajalin musamaa... faltasbir waltahtasib. waiin qaala: aa'zama allahu aajraka waaahsana 'azaa'aka waghafara limayitika fahasanun.
adhkar.instruction: (Inna lillahi ma akhath, walahu ma aAAta, wakullu shayin AAindahu bi-ajalin musamma…faltasbir waltahtasib.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation to be recited when placing the dead in his grave
adhkar.arabic: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَعَلَى سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (In the name of Allah and upon the sunnah of the Messenger of Allah.)
adhkar.transliteration: bismi allahi wa'alaa sunahi rasuwli allahi.
adhkar.instruction: (Bismil-lahi waAAala sunnati rasoolil-lah.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation to be recited after burying the dead
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ، اللَّهُمَّ ثَبِّتْهُ)).
adhkar.translation: O Allah, forgive him. O Allah, strengthen him
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aghfir lahu allahuma thabithu.
adhkar.instruction: Allaahum-maghfir lahu Allaahumma thabbithu

adhkar.arabic: ((السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الدِّيَارِ، مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ بِكُمْ لاَحِقُونَ، [وَيَرْحَمُ اللَّهُ الْمُسْتَقدِمِينَ مِنَّا وَالْمُسْتأْخِرِينَ] أَسْاَلُ اللَّهَ لَنَا وَلَكُمُ الْعَافِيَةَ)).
adhkar.translation: (Peace be upon you all, O inhabitants of the graves, amongst the believers and the Muslims. Verily we will, Allah willing, be united with you, we ask Allah for well-being for us and you.)
adhkar.transliteration: alsalaamu 'alaykum aahla aldiyaari mina almuminiyna waalmuslimiyna waiinaa iin shaa'a allahu bikum laahiquwna wayarhamu allahu almustaqdimiyna minaa waalmustakhiriyna aasaalu allaha lanaa walakumu al'aafiyaha.
adhkar.instruction: (Assalamu AAalaykum ahlad-diyari minal-mu/mineena walmuslimeen, wa-inna in shaal-lahu bikum lahiqoon, nas-alul-laha lana walakumul-AAafiyah.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for when the wind blows
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْــــــأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You for it’s goodness and I take refuge with You from it’s evil.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa a'udhu bika min sharriha
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocations for when the wind blows
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا، وَخَيْرَ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا، وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا، وَشَرِّ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You for it’s goodness, the good within it, and the good it was sent with, and I take refuge with You from it’s evil, the evil within it, and from the evil it was sent with.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma iiniy aasaaluka khayrahaa wakhayra maa fiyhaa wakhayra maa aursilat bihi waaa'uwdhu bika min sharihaa washari maa fiyhaa washari maa aursilat bihi.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wakhayra ma feeha, wakhayra ma orsilat bih, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha, washarri ma feeha washarri ma orsilat bih.)

adhkar.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلاَئِكةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (How perfect He is, (The One) Whom the thunder declares His perfection with His praise, as do the angles out of fear of Him.)
adhkar.transliteration: subhaana aladhiy yusabihu alra'du bihamdihi waalmalaaikhu min khiyfatihi.
adhkar.instruction: (Subhanal-lathee yusabbihur-raAAdu bihamdih, walmala-ikatu min kheefatih.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثاً مُغِيثاً مَرِيئاً مَرِيعاً، نَافِعاً غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ، عَاجِلاً غَيْرَ آجِلٍ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, send upon us helpful, wholesome and healthy rain, beneficial not harmful rain, now, not later.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma asqinaa ghaythaan mughiythaan mariyaan mariy'aan naafi'aan ghayra daarin 'aajilaan ghayra aajilin.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummas-qina ghaythan mugheethan maree-an mureeAAan, nafiAAan, ghayra dar, AAajilan ghayra ajil.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَغِثْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ أَغِثْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ أَغِثْنَا)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, relieve us, O Allah, relieve us, O Allah, relieve us.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma aaghithnaa allahuma aaghithnaa allahuma aaghithnaa.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma aghithna, allahumma aghithna, allahumma aghithna.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِ عِبَادَكَ، وَبَهَائِمَكَ، وَانْشُرْ رَحْمَتَكَ، وَأَحْيِي بَلَدَكَ الْمَيِّتَ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, provide water for Your servants and Your cattle, spread out Your mercy and resurrect Your dead land.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahuma asqi 'ibaadaka wabahaaimaka waanshur rahmataka waaahyiy baladaka almayita.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّباً نَافِعاً)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, may it be a beneficial rain cloud.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahumma sayyiban nafi'a
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma sayyiban nafiAAa.)

adhkar.arabic: ((مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ)).
adhkar.translation: (We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.)
adhkar.transliteration: mutirna bi fadlillahi wa rahmatih
adhkar.instruction: (Mutirna bifadlil-lahi warahmatih.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation for the withholding of the rain
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلاَ عَلَيْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ عَلَى الآكَامِ وَالظِّرَابِ، وَبُطُونِ الْأَوْدِيَةِ، وَمَنَابِتِ الشَّجَرِ)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, let the rain fall around us and not upon us, O Allah, (let it fall) on the pastures, hills, valleys and the roots of trees.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahumma hawalayna wa la 'alayna. allahumma 'alal-akami wadh-dhirabi, wa butunil-awdiyati, wa manabitish-shajar
adhkar.instruction: (Allahumma hawalayna wala AAalayna, allahumma AAalal-akami waththirab, wabutoonil-awdiyah, wamanabitish-shajar.)

adhkar.category_name: Invocation for sighting the new moon
adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْأَمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ، وَالسَّلاَمَةِ وَالْإِسْلاَمِ، وَالتَّوْفِيقِ لِمَا تُحِبُّ رَبَّنَا وَتَرْضَى، رَبُّنَا وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (Allah is the greatest. O Allah, let the crescent loom above us in safety, faith, peace, and Islam, and in agreement with all that You love and pleases You. Our Lord and your Lord is Allah.)
adhkar.transliteration: allahu aakbaru allahuma aahilahu 'alaynaa bialaamni waaliiymaani waalsalaamahi waaliislaami waaltawfiyqi limaa tuhibu rabanaa watardaa rabunaa warabuka allahu.
adhkar.instruction: (Allahu akbar, allahumma ahillahu AAalayna bil-amni wal-eeman, wassalamati wal-islam, wattawfeeiqi lima tuhibbu watarda, rabbuna warabbukal-lah.)

adhkar.arabic: ((ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ العُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).
adhkar.translation: (The thirst has gone and the veins are quenched, and reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.)
adhkar.transliteration: dhahabadh-dhama'u wabtallatil-'uruqu wa thabatal-ajru insha allah
adhkar.instruction: (Thahabath-thama-o wabtallatil-AAurooq, wathabatal-ajru in shaal-lah.)

adhkar.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي)).
adhkar.translation: (O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy which envelopes all things, that You forgive me.)
